differences.title: 1. PERFORMANCE
differences.leftDesc: Leverages native ES modules for near-instant server start and HMR.
differences.rightDesc: Bundles everything on startup, leading to slower build and dev server times.

differences.title: 2. ARCHITECTURE
differences.leftDesc: Serves modules over native ESM, only bundling for production builds.
differences.rightDesc: Bundles all code into a few files for browser execution.

differences.title: 3. CONFIGURATION
differences.leftDesc: Sensible defaults, often requires no configuration for basic projects.
differences.rightDesc: Extensive configuration needed for plugins, loaders, and optimizations.

differences.title: 4. HOT MODULE REPLACEMENT (HMR)
differences.leftDesc: HMR is extremely fast due to native ESM and optimized updates.
differences.rightDesc: HMR can be slower, especially in larger projects, due to the bundling process.

differences.title: 5. PLUGIN ECOSYSTEM
differences.leftDesc: Actively developing ecosystem, with Vite-specific plugins and Rollup compatibility.
differences.rightDesc: Vast and mature ecosystem of loaders and plugins for almost any task.

differences.title: 6. DEVELOPMENT SERVER
differences.leftDesc: Extremely fast and lightweight dev server built on native ESM.
differences.rightDesc: Robust dev server with many built-in features and extensive customization.

differences.title: 7. USE CASE
differences.leftDesc: Ideal for modern SPAs, libraries, and projects prioritizing dev speed.
differences.rightDesc: Suitable for complex enterprise apps, legacy projects, and fine-grained control.
